hero-kicker: AI, mobile, web and product execution in the same workflow.
hero-line-2: with clarity, depth and real impact.
hero-availability: Available for projects, products and new strategic initiatives.
services-subtitle: Where I create the most impact
service-1-desc: I build assistants, automations and AI-driven flows with a strong focus on usability, retention and continuous product evolution.
service-1-proof: Morf was an AI product case integrated with OpenAI, taken to real usage and continuously evolved during its active lifecycle.
service-2-desc: I work across Flutter and Android Kotlin, with experience in modular apps, MVVM architecture and feature delivery in professional environments.
service-2-proof: Hands-on experience across startup and corporate contexts, from CI/CD pipelines to real production use.
service-3-desc: I build websites, web platforms and integrations that connect product, content and real functionality in a consistent experience.
service-3-proof: From institutional websites to systems with QR codes, automations and WhatsApp integrations.
project-1-desc: Study assistant built at Questione.ai with OpenAI generative AI, designed to make learning more accessible, human and engaging.
project-2-desc: A digital ecosystem with website, QR code park access, validation app, WhatsApp automations and AI over conversation data.
project-3-desc: AI financial assistant built to track transactions, goals and connected accounts while simulating the impact of financial decisions in a practical product experience.
project-4-desc: A personal project used to deepen product vision, interface decisions and technical execution outside a traditional briefing.
project-5-desc: Santa Rocha's website positions the brand as a premium solution for architects, highlighting exclusive materials, specialized technical support and a high-end visual presentation.
project-6-desc: Institutional website for Brazilian Pharma & Health, focused on presenting programs, sector data and the international presence of Brazilian pharma and health companies.
description: I work across frontend, backend, mobile and UI, using different technologies in each area to build complete products. I move from ideation to production, combining interface, business logic and usability to deliver functional, consistent products.
experience-summary: A path that mixes large companies, startup work, critical maintenance, digital operations and personal products.

ClubeRincao.title: Software Engineer

responsibilities: Website maintenance and development of new features.
Built the park access system with QR codes on tickets.
Developed an app to validate tickets and visualize people inside the park.
Implemented an AI bot on WhatsApp and ticket delivery through WhatsApp.

responsibilities: Worked on the Abiquifi website and the dictionary website.
Keeps ongoing maintenance and evolution of the live projects.

Questione.title: Software Engineer
Questione.summary: Product work with applied AI, combining experience, technology and continuous evolution in a startup focused on learning.
responsibilities: Responsible for Morf, a study assistant integrated with OpenAI generative AI.
Used Bloc, WebSocket, Firebase Auth, Storage, Firestore, Remote Config, Analytics and Codemagic CI/CD.
Continuously evolved a real product during its active lifecycle, with focus on experience and stability.
Built a CRM with HTML, CSS and JavaScript frontend and Node.js with Express backend.

CI&T.title: Android Developer

responsibilities: Developed features in a modularized Kotlin application.
Worked with MVVM architecture and continuous integration in the delivery flow.
Strengthened the technical mobile foundation in a structured environment.
